tag.name: Meta - Push Custom Context to dataLayer

parameter.value:
<script>
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
window.dataLayer.push({
  source_domain: '{{Page Hostname}}',
  page_category: '{{Page - Category}}',
  page_type: '{{Page - Type}}',
  page_slug: '{{Page - Slug}}'
});
</script>

tag.name: [META] Lead Event - Sucesso Lead (/obrigado-lead)
tag.notes: FIX: trigger 8 existia mas nao disparava pixel Meta. Corrigido.

parameter.value:
<script>
  if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
    fbq('track', 'Lead', {
      content_name: 'Lead Formulario SmartDent',
      content_category: 'Lead Comercial',
      value: 0,
      currency: 'BRL'
    });
  }
</script>
